g.text: Single PostgreSQL database ‘butlers’ • Per-butler schemas (isolated) • Shared schema (cross-butler identity) • MCP-only inter-butler communication
SHARED SCHEMA — Cross-butler identity (all butlers have SELECT; contacts module has INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE)
-- enforces at most one owner contact
SEARCH PATH — Per-butler layered lookup (set by schema_search_path() in db.py)
ALEMBIC MIGRATION BRANCHES — Multi-chain, independently versioned
CROSS-BUTLER COMMUNICATION RULE — MCP-only through Switchboard (no direct DB access between butlers)
Butler A must NOT query Butler B's schema.
No SELECT relationship.contacts FROM general butler.
No schema cross-access except via shared.*
